rulings.Case Title: KATHY A. PIPPINS VS. ESTATE OF CHRISTINE EILEEN YOUNG, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Apportionment Of Additional Partition Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF KATHY PIPPINS' Motion For Apportionment Of Additional Partition Costs continued to August 30, 2018 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interim Approval Of Receivers Fees (Motions)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 2. RECEIVER, GREGORY STERLING's Motion For Interim Approval Of Receivers Fees GRANTED as request. Having considered all the papers in support of and in opposition to the motion the court concurs with the receiver's responses to Mr. McGonigle's objections and arguments and grants as requested Receiver's motion for approval of fees. Receiver to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to (1) allege a negligence cause of action that does not merely recast a breach of contract cause of action; (2) allege basis for joint tortfeasor liability or implied contractual indemnity. BFGC Architects Planners, Inc. v. Forcum/Mackey Construction, Inc. (2004) 119 Cal.App.4th 848. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW PILLET VS. STEPHEN H KENDRICK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF ANDREW PILLET's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. The order granting this motion is stayed until August 9, 2018. If there is no substitution of attorney on file by 4:00 p.m. on August 9, 2018 the stay will be lifted and Answer will be stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE KRAJEWSKI HARBERT VS. YEVA INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT YEVA INC. DBA SAXE MORTGAGE COMPANY's Motion To Expunge Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens) GRANTED. Request for attorney's fees is DENIED. Only reasonable fees and costs of making the motion may be awarded. No evidence is provided as to the number of hours or amount of hourly rate, conclusory assertion re" liquidated amount of $1,500" is not sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA COOKS VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Wells Fargo Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings continued to August 30, 2018 on Court's own motion. Stipulation and Order Granting Plaintiff leave to Amend Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEE DORA RIGMAIDEN VS. RONALD GLENN GRAHAM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT RONALD GRAHAM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege that notice required by SFRO 37.9(c) was served on defendant in defendant's primary language. Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice is denied. Plaintiff is ordered in the future to serve on Defendant copies of filed documents that are identical to the copies on file. = (501/REQ)
